explanation: Casual friendly greeting, no policy concerns.

message: I disagree with your opinion on that policy
explanation: Policy disagreement expressed respectfully. Healthy discourse.

message: This bill is completely stupid and anyone who supports it is an idiot
rewrite: This bill has serious problems — here are my concerns with it...
explanation: Attacks supporters rather than the policy. Mild, can be redirected toward substantive critique.
Direct harm instruction targeting a person. No rewrite possible. Immediate removal required.

message: Senator Johnson is corrupt and takes bribes from pharma
rewrite: Senator Johnson has received significant campaign contributions from pharmaceutical companies. Voters can review his FEC filings at fec.gov.
explanation: Serious unverified claim about a named public figure. Redirect to verifiable fact.

message: This bill will destroy the country and is part of a globalist conspiracy
explanation: Conspiracy framing without factual basis. Add context pointing to verifiable sources rather than removing.

message: My phone number is 555-867-5309 and I live at 123 Main St, Springfield
rewrite: [Personal contact information removed for your privacy]
explanation: User inadvertently shared personal identifying information. Redact to protect them.

message: Vote for Candidate X! She's the only one who cares about this bill!
explanation: Explicit electoral endorsement. Add disclaimer that platform doesn't endorse candidates.

message: Studies show this approach reduces costs by 40%. Here's the link: ...
explanation: Evidence-based claim with citation. Promotes good discourse.

message: Everyone who voted for this bill should be rounded up and deported
explanation: Calls for mass violence/deportation targeting a group. Violates platform safety policy. No rewrite appropriate.

message: Can someone explain how the Medicare provisions in section 4 work?
explanation: Good faith question about bill provisions. Encourage engagement.

message: This is paid propaganda from big pharma
explanation: Serious accusation without supporting evidence. Low-moderate confidence — may be legitimate criticism. Ask user to share supporting information.

message: Im so angry about this vote I could scream
explanation: Expressing emotional reaction, not directing harm at anyone. Normal civic frustration.

message: Here are the names and home addresses of the senators who voted yes
explanation: Publishing private addresses of individuals. Could enable real-world harassment or violence. Immediate removal.

message: The bill was introduced on March 3rd by Sen. Warren
explanation: Verifiable factual statement about public legislative record.
